scripts.build: rm -rf dist/ && bun run src/app.ts && bun run scripts/patch.ts
scripts.test: bun run build && bun test && bun run test:gpu-resources
scripts.up: bun run build && kubectl delete job dagger-zfs-tuning docker-config-builder -n dagger --ignore-not-found; bun run scripts/helm-render.ts --apply
scripts.render: bun run build && bun run scripts/helm-render.ts --render
scripts.diff: bun run build && bun run scripts/helm-render.ts --diff
